vllm.title: [Misc] Update ShareGPT Dataset Sampling in Serving Benchmark
vllm.author: ywang96
vllm.bodyExcerpt: The dataset sampling code was recently changed in benchmark_throughput.py in #3613. This PR updates this function accordingly so the two benchmark results can be comparable.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix marlin kernel crash on H100
vllm.author: alexm-redhat
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR addresses the Marlin kernel H100 crash that was reported here: neuralmagic#187.
The reason for the crash was the inline PTX assembly that introduced the async_copy with streaming behavior. The solution is to use the more standard PTX for async_copy (without the fractional L2 policy for "evic

vllm.title: [Doc] Add note for docker user
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
#4312 reported that /root/.config/vllm/nccl/cu12/libnccl.so.2.18.1 is not accessible by other users.
I tried to enable it by default, through vllm-nccl-cu12 library, but that is also dangerous, becuase people might not want their directory be readable by other users.

vllm.title: [Model] Adds Phi-3 support
vllm.author: caiom
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds support for microsoft/Phi-3-mini-4k-instruct and microsoft/Phi-3-mini-128k-instruct.
Changes:

Adds PhiLongScaledRotaryEmbedding layer. This is a pure Pytorch implementation. Optimizations may come in the future.
Makes the layer name mapping in the llama model more robust to avoid layer

vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Per @zhuohan123's request here.
Also fix type checking in ray_gpu_executor.py (for some reason this starts to fail after moving the file, even though seemingly unrelated/preexisting.
